problems_encountered.description: Mittwald API returned HTTP 403 Forbidden when attempting to list Redis versions. Endpoint GET /v2/redis-versions requires permissions that may not be available for this account or Redis feature may not be enabled.

tool_response_summary: Tool invocation failed with HTTP 403 from Mittwald API. MCP tool correctly formatted the request but lacks required permissions for Redis version catalog access.
execution_notes: Unlike MySQL versions (which succeeded), Redis versions endpoint is permission-restricted. This may indicate Redis is a premium feature or requires explicit enablement. Tool's error handling properly captures and reports the 403 status.
